ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was recorded */,
  "district" TEXT /* District within the state */,
  "rainfall" INTEGER /* Amount of rainfall recorded */,
  "RH" REAL /* Relative humidity recorded */,
  "tmin" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "tmax" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "occurred" TEXT /* Indication if an event occurred */,
  "location_coordinates" TEXT /* GPS coordinates (latitude and longitude) of the weather station */,
  "weather_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specific weather station where the data was recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed recorded */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation recorded */,
  "atmospheric_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure recorded */,
  "precipitation_type" TEXT /* Type of precipitation (e.g., rain, snow, hail) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the state is located in */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* ISO or other standardized code for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the state in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the state the district is in */,
  "district_code" TEXT /* ISO or other standardized code for the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the district in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the district in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rainfall_records" (
  "rainfall_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rainfall record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record the rainfall is associated with */,
  "rainfall_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of rainfall */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the rainfall occurred */,
  "rainfall_type" TEXT /* Type of rainfall (e.g., light, moderate, heavy) */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the rainfall in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rainfall_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rainfall_records_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "humidity_records" (
  "humidity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each humidity record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record the humidity is associated with */,
  "humidity_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of relative humidity */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the humidity was recorded */,
  "dew_point" REAL /* Dew point temperature */,
  "humidity_source" TEXT /* Source of the humidity data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("humidity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_humidity_records_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "temperature_records" (
  "temperature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record the temperature is associated with */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the temperature was recorded */,
  "average_temp" REAL /* Average temperature recorded */,
  "temperature_source" TEXT /* Source of the temperature data (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("temperature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_records_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_records" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record the event is associated with */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., drought, flood, storm) */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_records_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., farmer, agronomist, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather record accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "successful" INTEGER /* Whether the access attempt was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
